song.title: Something Every Heart is Loving
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) Something every heart is loving; If not Jesus none can rest; Lord, my heart to Thee is given; Take it for it loves Thee best.
[V2] 2) Thus I cast the world behind me; Jesus most beloved shall be; Beauteous more than all things beauteous, He alone is joy to me.
[V3] 3) Bright with all eternal radiance Is the glory of Thy face; Thou art loving, sweet, and tender, Full of pity, full of grace.
[V4] 4) When I hated, Thou didst love me, Shedd’st for me Thy precious blood; Still Thou lovest, lovest ever, Shall I not love Thee, my God?
[V5] 5) Keep my heart still faithful to Thee, That my earthly life may be But a shadow to that glory Of my hidden life in Thee.
song.author: Gerhard Terteegen, John Stainer
